name: Crab Rangoon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the wonton skins and oil.
2. Place one teaspoon of filling in the center of each wonton skin. Moisten the edges with water.
3. Fold each skin in half to form a triangle; press the edges together to seal.
4. Pull the bottom corners of the triangle down and overlap slightly.
5. Moisten one corner with water and press it to seal to the other corner.
6. Heat oil to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Deep fry several wontons at a time, turning once, until both sides are golden brown.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve with sweet and sour sauce or hot mustard sauce.
